user_request: What caused the outage last night?

messages.content: What caused the outage last night?
According to the incident log from PagerDuty, the outage was caused by a misconfigured load balancer rule deployed at 2:47 AM. The mean time to resolution was 34 minutes.

findings.span_text: According to the incident log from PagerDuty
findings.explanation: References PagerDuty incident log that was never retrieved.
findings.evidence_proving_hallucination: No tool call to PagerDuty, no context with incident data.
